name: Claude Opus 4

claude-opus-4-20250514 (32k thinking budget) on Aider's own official polyglot leaderboard, confirmed via direct fetch; the no-think configuration of the same model scored 70.7% on the same leaderboard. Independently corroborated by Aider's creator Paul Gauthier (https://x.com/paulgauthier/status/1926773685597172151): 'Claude 4 Opus scored 72% on the aider polyglot coding benchmark... with 32k think tokens.'

verificationNotes: Real model, confirmed via anthropic.com/news/claude-4 and Google Cloud Vertex AI blog (release 2025-05-22, $15/$75 pricing, 200K context). All 7 result rows confirmed verbatim via direct fetch of datacamp.com/blog/claude-4. Per Anthropic's official model-deprecations page (fetched 2026-07-12), claude-opus-4-20250514 was deprecated 2026-04-14 and RETIRED 2026-06-15 — already past as of today (2026-07-12), so apiAvailable corrected to false (status kept as 'deprecated', closest available enum value; true current state is 'retired').
